// src/data/events.js

const events = [
  // ======================
  // OFFICIAL HOLIDAYS 2025
  // ======================

  { title: "New Year Day", date: "2025-01-01", type: "holiday" },
  { title: "Sankranti / Pongal", date: "2025-01-14", type: "holiday" },
  { title: "Maha Shivaratri", date: "2025-02-26", type: "holiday" },
  { title: "Eid Ul Fitr (Ramzan)", date: "2025-03-31", type: "holiday" },
  { title: "Good Friday", date: "2025-04-18", type: "holiday" },
  { title: "Independence Day", date: "2025-08-15", type: "holiday" },
  { title: "Vinayaka Chavithi", date: "2025-08-27", type: "holiday" },
  { title: "Gandhi Jayanthi / Dussehra", date: "2025-10-02", type: "holiday" },
  { title: "Diwali", date: "2025-10-20", type: "holiday" },
  { title: "Christmas", date: "2025-12-25", type: "holiday" },

  // ======================
  // SAMPLE LEAVES
  // ======================

  { title: "Annual Leave", date: "2025-01-10", type: "leave" },
  { title: "Casual Leave", date: "2025-02-12", type: "leave" },
  { title: "Annual Leave", date: "2025-03-14", type: "leave" },
  { title: "Sick Leave", date: "2025-04-09", type: "leave" },
  { title: "Annual Leave", date: "2025-05-16", type: "leave" },
  { title: "Casual Leave", date: "2025-06-18", type: "leave" },
  { title: "Annual Leave", date: "2025-07-11", type: "leave" },
  { title: "Sick Leave", date: "2025-08-08", type: "leave" },
  { title: "Annual Leave", date: "2025-09-19", type: "leave" },
  { title: "Casual Leave", date: "2025-10-10", type: "leave" },
  { title: "Annual Leave", date: "2025-11-21", type: "leave" },
  { title: "Casual Leave", date: "2025-12-10", type: "leave" },

  // ======================
  // SAMPLE BIRTHDAYS
  // ======================

  { title: "Rahul Birthday", date: "2025-01-20", type: "birthday" },
  { title: "Manager Birthday", date: "2025-02-18", type: "birthday" },
  { title: "Team Lead Birthday", date: "2025-03-25", type: "birthday" },
  { title: "HR Birthday", date: "2025-04-22", type: "birthday" },
  { title: "Colleague Birthday", date: "2025-05-06", type: "birthday" },
  { title: "Friend Birthday", date: "2025-06-14", type: "birthday" },
  { title: "Senior Birthday", date: "2025-07-29", type: "birthday" },
  { title: "Dad Birthday", date: "2025-08-20", type: "birthday" },
  { title: "Mom Birthday", date: "2025-09-03", type: "birthday" },
  { title: "Brother Birthday", date: "2025-10-28", type: "birthday" },
  { title: "Sister Birthday", date: "2025-11-11", type: "birthday" },
  { title: "Friend Birthday", date: "2025-12-05", type: "birthday" },
];

export default events;
